title: GLPG-0492
description: GLPG-0492 is a non-steroidal selective androgen receptor modulator (SARM) designed to bind to the androgen receptor with high affinity while exhibiting tissue-selective anabolic activity. It was originally developed to treat muscle-wasting conditions and muscular dystrophy by stimulating muscle growth and Improving performance with reduced androgenic effects on reproductive organs.

research.title: Characterization of GLPG0492, a selective androgen receptor modulator, in a mouse model of hindlimb immobilization
research.summary: This study found that GLPG-0492 effectively prevented muscle mass loss and preserved muscle fiber size in mice during periods of inactivity.

research.title: GLPG0492, a novel selective androgen receptor modulator, improves muscle performance in the exercised-mdx mouse model of muscular dystrophy
research.summary: Research demonstrated that GLPG-0492 improved diaphragm and limb muscle function and increased running performance in models of Duchenne muscular dystrophy.

research.title: Comparison of the three SARMs RAD-140, GLPG0492 and GSK-2881078 in two different in vitro bioassays, and in an in silico androgen receptor binding assay
research.summary: This comparative analysis confirmed GLPG-0492's strong androgenic potential in prostate cells and provided molecular modeling of its binding to the androgen receptor.

sentiment.summary: Users generally view GLPG-0492 as an effective but 'mild' SARM compared to compounds like RAD-140, with many highlighting its niche status and relative obscurity in the current market.

effects.label: Anabolic Selectivity:
effects.description: Demonstrates a high ratio of muscle-to-prostate activity, reducing the risk of androgenic side effects

effects.label: Recovery Speed:
effects.description: Users report faster recovery times between training sessions and reduced muscle soreness

effects.label: Mild Potency:
effects.description: Often considered less 'explosive' for mass building than LGD-4033 but easier to manage in terms of side effects

dosage.label: Common Range:
dosage.description: Most anecdotal reports suggest a daily total of 5mg to 15mg taken once per day

dosage.label: Starting Dose:
dosage.description: Users often recommend starting at 5mg to assess individual tolerance before increasing

dosage.label: Cycle Length:
dosage.description: Standard cycles typically last 8 to 12 weeks followed by appropriate post-cycle therapy

sideEffects.label: Hormonal Suppression:
sideEffects.description: Like most SARMs, it can cause a temporary reduction in natural testosterone levels, especially at higher doses

sideEffects.label: Lipid Changes:
sideEffects.description: Potential for a slight reduction in HDL (good cholesterol) during the cycle

sideEffects.label: Liver Enzymes:
sideEffects.description: Rare reports of mild elevations in liver enzymes, though generally considered less hepatotoxic than oral steroids

availability.label: Sourcing Difficulty:
availability.description: Less commonly available than mainstream SARMs like Ostarine, often requiring specialized research chemical suppliers

availability.label: WADA Status:
availability.description: Explicitly listed as a prohibited substance in competitive sports under the S1.2 Anabolic Agents category

availability.label: Research Status:
availability.description: Development appears to have stalled in clinical phases, leaving it primarily in the 'research chemical' market
